description: Style Note The Zeitfrei from adidas is a lifestyle shoe - a modern reinterpretation of the humble sneaker. Crafted from the highest quality materials, the upper features stylish, understated classic 3-Stripes, giving an Adidas twist that makes this shoe top our wish-list for the season! men, class up your casual act with this stylish sneaker. Recommended for casual wear; looks best when worn with a matching leather jacket. Product Details Black and yellow sneakers, leather textile upper with perforations for breathability, Adidas 3-Stripe details at the midfoot region , soft footbed, reinforced overlay at the heel collar, central lace-ups, padded tongue with branding, rubber outsole with patterned grooves for grip Material and Care Leather, rubber outsole Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
